title: Progress Test
objectives: Assess vocabulary from Unit 7 (hobbies, indoor/outdoor activities)
Test reading comprehension with a passage about helping cats
Evaluate grammar: like/enjoy + verb-ing and possessive adjectives
Assess guided writing about last summer holiday

exercises.problem: Playing football is an amazing ............ (a. chess, b. hobby, c. coin)
The teacher took us to do some ............ activities. (a. rainy, b. cloudy, c. outdoor)
They ............ beautiful houses of blocks. (a. build, b. dive, c. sail)
My cousin likes doing ............ on weekends. (a. crafts, b. tracks, c. seasons)
Read about Ali and the cat. The best title: (a. Playing with Friends, b. Saving Cats, c. At School)
The underlined word 'They' in line 5 refers to: (a. Ali and his friends, b. cats, c. places)
Ali and his friends gave the cat food and some ............ (a. track, b. milk, c. school)
Where did Ali and his friends see the cat?
I enjoy ............ healthy food. (a. eat, b. eating, c. ate)
She bought a new bag. ............ bag is big. (a. His, b. Her, c. Their)
This is our teacher. ............ name is Ali. (a. Their, b. Our, c. His)
Write about 'Last Summer Holiday' using guide words: go-beach, sister-castle, amazing-time
exercises.answer: Last summer, we went to the beach. My sister built a castle. We had an amazing time.

exercises.problem: Complete: 1. This is my __________ sister. 2. I enjoy doing __________ with my friend. 3. My __________ is writing.

teaching_notes: Progress test covers all Unit 7 skills. The reading passage about saving cats tests comprehension and values (kindness to animals). Grammar tests both like/enjoy + verb-ing and possessive adjectives. Writing requires a guided paragraph about a summer holiday.
